actionConfiguration.body:
INSERT INTO site_surveys (
  site_id,
  vehicle_access,
  vehicle_access_notes,
  parking_loading_bay,
  parking_notes,
  access_restrictions,
  access_restriction_notes,
  time_restrictions,
  time_restriction_notes,
  equipment_floor,
  floor_access_type,
  lift_restrictions,
  lift_notes,
  narrow_corridors,
  corridor_notes,
  security_procedures,
  security_details,
  driver_instructions,
  surveyed_by,
  survey_date
) VALUES (
  {{Number(appsmith.store.new_site_id)}},
  {{appsmith.store.ss_vehicle_access}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_vehicle_access_notes}}',
  {{appsmith.store.ss_parking_loading_bay}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_parking_notes}}',
  {{appsmith.store.ss_access_restrictions}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_access_restriction_notes}}',
  {{appsmith.store.ss_time_restrictions}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_time_restriction_notes}}',
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_equipment_floor}}',
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_floor_access_type}}',
  {{appsmith.store.ss_lift_restrictions}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_lift_notes}}',
  {{appsmith.store.ss_narrow_corridors}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_corridor_notes}}',
  {{appsmith.store.ss_security_procedures}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_security_details}}',
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_driver_instructions}}',
  '{{appsmith.user.name}}',
  CURRENT_DATE
)
RETURNING survey_id;
